questions.objective_ref: Define a coordinate as a scalar that gives position along one axis
Read a 2D point from axes given a feature vector (e.g., energy=0.8, mood=0.3 on a 2D plane)
Interpret a feature vector as a point in taste-space
Explain that closeness between points means similarity between the things they represent
Recognise the vocabulary term neighbourhood AND identify a real AI system (recommendation) that uses the geometric point-in-space idea.
